data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁29
data.summary: [3/26 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[3/26 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 5
▶ Period: Permanent
▶ More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2533094

#BlueArchive
